name: Interactive Banner
description: This block displays a banner with an animated header and a subtitle.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Primary authored content. Follow the sidekick block page for the exact table/content shape and examples.

usageNotes: -desktop-breakpoints: represents the number of words after a newline is inserted in the animated text -mobile-breakpoints: represents the number of words after a newline is inserted in the animated text oln mobile
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
